ItacPersonItem.Notes: This is probably the same Count of Prata to whom Cieco d`Adria addressed a madrigal entitled `Vertuno in marmo`. Montalbano joined the Ricovrati in 1601 and his task within the Academy was `assistente alla musica`.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
